LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS PETER WALL AND 504 MANAGEMENT COMPANY LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES REGARDING WHAT CAUSED THE FIRE, WHETHER DEFENDANT HAD OR SHOULD HAVE HAD NOTICE OF THE ELECTRICAL DEFECTS, WHETHER DEFENDANT KNEW OF THE DANGER AND CONCEALED IT AND/OR MADE FALSE REPRESENTATIONS REGARDING THE SAFETY OF THE PREMISES, AND WHETHER DEFENDANT ACTED WITH A CONSCIOUS DISREGARD TOWARDS THE SAFETY OF THE TENANTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ariel M. Gershon, Esq., from Greenstein & McDonald, 415-773-1240 X-351, for Plaintiff and opposing party

No other appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANTS PETER WALL AND 504 MANAGEMENT COMPANY LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied in its entirety. There are triable issues regarding what caused the fire, whether defendant had or should have had notice of the electrical defects, whether defendant knew of the danger and concealed it and/or made false representations regarding the safety of the premises, and whether defendant acted with a conscious disregard towards the safety of the tenants.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
